Name: Man-TLE
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

Founded in 3016, the mysterious Man-TLE sprung up as a manufacturer of True Life Experiences, bootleg and low-grade knockoffs of Kensai Holographiks' Recreational Hologram Environments. The company's TLEs differ from Kensai's RHEs for their inclusion of the narcotic substance known as "Can-Do", which when burned when viewing the holo heightens its sensory impacts. Despite the Free Worlds League Parliament declaring the sale of TLEs illegal, drawing both investigations from SAFE and ROM, sales expand at a rapid pace.

Reputation with the criminal underworld isn't about cordial relations. After all, such organisations are often in conflict. Rather, it represents a Mercenary Company's criminal street cred, or conversely their actions acting as the various Houses police force.
ReputationStatements: Security contractors make me nervous. You people tend to break merchandise.
We create experiences people actually want. Governments just call that illegal competition.
You don’t need to understand the market. Just keep our competitors from interfering with it.
This operation is about market access. Violence is simply a delivery expense.
Demand for TLEs continues to exceed projections. Certain authorities find this upsetting.
Efficient, professional, low-profile. You’re rapidly becoming one of our preferred contractors.
You’ve proven remarkably discreet. That quality is worth paying for.
MissionSuccessStatements: Excellent outcome. Distribution channels remain open and customer demand continues rising.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Disappointing outcome. Still, you kept the authorities from seizing the entire operation.
BadFaithFailureStatements: You abandoned the operation and left product exposed to confiscation. That creates very unpleasant conversations for us.
